title: Boot puck production firmware
description: Boot lichen/apps/puck on native_sim/native_sim 64 where supportable and on the validated T-Echo Renode ARM path. Require a late puck marker plus an externally observed effect; extend to other declared emulator/hardware backends only where the platform can provide honest proof.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Native production puck reaches a late runtime marker or structured telemetry oracle. 2. T-Echo Renode asserts Zephyr boot, puck main, lichen-sim connection, and at least one firmware-driven TX. 3. Every puck board fragment is classified WIN/FAIL/BLOCKED. 4. Commands, revision, hashes, logs, and cleanup are recorded. 5. Failures have linked remediation Beads.
notes:
SOURCE/BUILDER: base revision 8e02a7ae924a226c91c23d8d19f0f5350c248364. Current native64 build additionally used scoped patch fingerprint d22f4eb7467bbb5955175c2e504137d1a1cd3d1fad779766a76d3ed5763bd8f8 on verified builder i-03d978911e97d4350, ARM64 us-west-2c, workspace /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-m5m1, SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH=1784142068. T-ECHO RENODE WIN, reused independently verified project-LICHEN-7i0p evidence: build form west build -p always -b t_echo/nrf52840 -s $repo/lichen/apps/puck -d build/t_echo_renode -- -DBOARD_ROOT=$repo/lichen -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$repo/lichen -DEXTRA_DTC_OVERLAY_FILE=$repo/lichen/boards/renode/nrf52840_lichen/support/renode_console.overlay -DEXTRA_CONF_FILE=$repo/lichen/boards/renode/nrf52840_lichen/support/renode_console.conf. Runtime form PYTHONPATH=python/src uv run python /var/folders/pg/t21pc_0j6_3bq40d087mjbrw0000gn/T/opencode/lichen-7i0p-harness.py on clean fleet AMI ami-0764d1b512e22671f, c7g.xlarge, Renode 1.16.1. Artifact lichen-7i0p-final.elf SHA-256 75912f6657aab318eab188e10b73177d28921c5c103affdc2138a4aaa7307693. Oracles: UART contains Booting Zephyr OS, LICHEN puck starting, and L2/CoAP mode on t_echo; Renode log contains Connected to lichen-sim; harness requires sim.metrics.transmissions > 0 and recorded 3 transmissions. Retained local evidence hashes: UART c310fea7f1acc8df5344583af52d6bb6929e242128afed777072e8c042fb6290; Renode c2c0a48c4b5ba0d6cd5c9b1b953f6a7f93f8823da5793657c61c9224d668948d; stdio 715735c625d415584041ff6bdb7c2cb500965ad8bf9e00d93463e35f0e73b0f0; harness e6e026b0c5c8822f568f191703682de7ddf639f3d61181f5b60072890d5cb571; exact source bundle lichen-7i0p-usb-free-source.tgz 987dba52afa3d45e9bbcde2e4480b08642e66f5beff67dbdea98daaa37bf1c3b. Paths are under /var/folders/pg/t21pc_0j6_3bq40d087mjbrw0000gn/T/opencode/. 7i0p cleanup terminated validator i-02b42f8916930bd83 and builder i-0eaec6fe82cfa8701, deleted SG sg-0b2ef4c11837e3f4b, and verified EBS available/unattached. NATIVE_SIM/NATIVE/64 FAIL for late-oracle criterion: command west build -p always -b native_sim/native/64 -s $repo/lichen/apps/puck -d /mnt/lichen-zephyr/validation/project-LICHEN-m5m1/puck-native64 -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$repo/lichen; runtime timeout 20s puck-native64/zephyr/zephyr.exe > puck-native64-runtime.log 2>&1. It booted Zephyr and entered puck main but logged LoRa radio unavailable: -95 and emitted no TELEMETRY or CoAP GET; process remained in Zephyr until expected timeout 124. Artifact SHA-256 aecbf62b48830b1068726adee901ae7d3efb9e25774080371eb128313388f08a. Local evidence: puck-native64.exe same hash, puck-native64-build.log SHA-256 96dfe7261e7babc9646dabe5c01b9ad86bc062e78e537fe4a15aece0b34ed8c2, puck-native64-runtime.log SHA-256 70c876154f726e0730846aa73d1cfb9a3ec5f76e33797e070c0e989b18dd2957 under the same opencode directory. Remediation project-LICHEN-pm2o. NATIVE_SIM 32-BIT BLOCKED: reachable builder is ARM64; strict x86 builder access tracked by project-LICHEN-o4yi. BOARD ROWS: WIN t_echo/nrf52840 as above. BLOCKED rak4631/nrf52840, nucleo_wl55jc, r1_neo/nrf52840, t1000_e/nrf52840, heltec_wifi_lora32_v3/esp32s3/procpu, t_deck/esp32s3/procpu, and ttgo_lora32/esp32/procpu pending physical/faithful emulator proof under project-LICHEN-v9qz. FAIL tbeam_supreme because no canonical Zephyr 3.7 board exists; remediation project-LICHEN-w8rd. Stale nrf52840_lichen and t_echo_nrf52840 command selectors are not counted as targets. Current native build passed module-isolation verification and left no process; local git diff --check passes.
AUTHORITATIVE FRESH RESULTS superseding historical T-Echo reuse and native64 FAIL above. NATIVE_SIM/NATIVE/64 WIN after adding minimal puck loopback fragments. New untracked source hashes: native_sim.conf and native_sim_native_64.conf each 53d55506b8fc260024a61a97cbb63f5d86d64b0197de5cb7e503b0ae65fe8f73; native_sim.overlay and native_sim_native_64.overlay each 27f97e653d54c26d6247f4ab5488520b6d6769b6d72597e71afdc38eaa3c0bc0. Final command: west build -p always -b native_sim/native/64 -s /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-m5m1/lichen/apps/puck -d /mnt/lichen-zephyr/validation/project-LICHEN-m5m1/puck-native64-loopback -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-m5m1/lichen; timeout 35s puck-native64-loopback/zephyr/zephyr.exe > puck-native64-loopback-runtime.log 2>&1. Oracle: Zephyr boot, full L2 initialization, puck main, L2/CoAP mode on native_sim, and CoAP GET /status sent at 10.610 s and 25.760 s; expected timeout 124 after continued runtime. Artifact puck-native64-loopback.exe SHA-256 5fd9827276d6219ac3f6b29c61c1987d954ac1bed77dd9f640755ee2fc2c5057; build log 0dc643bf992a46cb088aa163b11af68b3b69b2c19ee7125ff464c59041db0394; runtime log 0f26dfb504dea3fc36a8e253d23cc08a527ee80b9dd49d322c964ec465392040, retained under the opencode evidence directory. CURRENT T-ECHO RENODE WIN: exact build command west build -p always -b t_echo/nrf52840 -s /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-m5m1/lichen/apps/puck -d /mnt/lichen-zephyr/validation/project-LICHEN-m5m1/puck-t-echo-renode -- -DBOARD_ROOT=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-m5m1/lichen -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-m5m1/lichen -DEXTRA_DTC_OVERLAY_FILE=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-m5m1/lichen/boards/renode/nrf52840_lichen/support/renode_console.overlay -DEXTRA_CONF_FILE=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-m5m1/lichen/boards/renode/nrf52840_lichen/support/renode_console.conf. Runtime: cd python && PYTHONPATH=src uv run python opencode/puck-current-t-echo-harness.py, stdout retained. Current vector geometry independently read from ELF: VTOR 0x32200, SP 0x2000e5c0, PC 0x35bed. Artifact puck-current-t-echo.elf SHA-256 0ef9682ae6b1be2fc854572b02de0b0bb7e97b341030eabde1c6e84d2aaae741; build log e0e356bebc69358cbccdd8e26994c6a0ea547aa103679cfcc7034a7cf0f0ece3; harness b90aff171d9c1cbf937376d02417499d34d061fa6b4ed5c7fffbdff2891fbbf0; retained stdout 8000d303de18461fb7e7d19782b639b698f7ec4691029d754be494969d6af2d4; UART c310fea7f1acc8df5344583af52d6bb6929e242128afed777072e8c042fb6290; Renode log ca9fc4da04722700cfbe3dae37085c05c1d1c9b3baea883f218883f2e26255f5; Renode stdio 089c2a8f16e7e97a0a85336152868acab17ac3c3125c78aa7c00197fbff9328e. Harness stdout explicitly records booting_zephyr=True, puck_main=True, l2_coap_mode=True, sim_connected=True, transmissions=3. Both builds passed module-isolation verification; local and remote runtime process checks are empty. Native32 remains BLOCKED under directly linked project-LICHEN-o4yi. Board classifications and v9qz/w8rd followups are unchanged.
RUNTIME COMMAND CORRECTION: exact T-Echo invocation was cd /Volumes/Attic/Desktop/Projects/project-LICHEN/python && PYTHONPATH=src uv run python /var/folders/pg/t21pc_0j6_3bq40d087mjbrw0000gn/T/opencode/puck-current-t-echo-harness.py | tee /var/folders/pg/t21pc_0j6_3bq40d087mjbrw0000gn/T/opencode/puck-current-t-echo-harness-stdout.log.

close_reason: Proved current puck firmware on native_sim/native/64 with full L2 and repeated late CoAP sends, and on T-Echo Renode with retained boot/main/L2/simulator assertions plus 3 independently counted transmissions. Recorded exact source/artifact/log/harness hashes and cleanup. Classified native32 BLOCKED under o4yi, seven remaining boards BLOCKED under v9qz, and orphaned tbeam_supreme FAIL under w8rd. Reviews converged with no findings.
